creator: svenasse@polaris.ca
text:
This is also a maintainer update.  Roman no longer has time to update this
port and has agreed to hand the port to me.

Changes include:

 - support for additional MTAs (currently sendmail and qmail)
 - proper install/deinstall scripts for the port for all MTAs

Removed pkg-deinstall
Removed pkg-install
Removed pkg-message
Added pkg-install.sendmail
Added pkg-install.qmail
Added pkg-deinstall.sendmail
Added pkg-deinstall.qmail
Added pkg-message.sendmail
Added pkg-message.qmail
